chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-144 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2021 and it was just the once fixed in Court on 02.02.2021 when subject to maintainability of the petition, notices were ordered to be issued against respondents and A.A.G. Sindh. Thereafter no serious efforts have been made to proceed with the petition. Such conduct on the part of the petitioner manifestly suggests his no interest in the proceedings. As such, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
